query: What is my favorite programming language right now?
expected_content:
What's my favorite programming language now?

After spending the last six months on Rust you've said multiple times Rust is now your favorite. Python is still your daily driver for ML work but no longer your favorite.

What's my usual coffee order now?

You switched to oat-milk lattes about three months ago after deciding plain drip was too harsh.

What's my title at work right now?

You were promoted to Staff Engineer last quarter. Senior Engineer is your previous title.

Where am I at relationship-wise now?

You said earlier this year that you've been single again for a few months. Treat older dating notes as out of date.
